query: INSERT INTO site_settings (settingKey, settingValue) VALUES ('pastorsNetworkContent', 'The Pastors Connection Network (PCN) is a national and international ministry dedicated to connecting, mentoring, and equipping pastors and churches for sustainable, faithful ministry. PCN operates from the conviction that pastoral isolation is one of the most underaddressed crises in the church today, and that every pastor—regardless of geography, denomination, or resources—deserves genuine community and meaningful development. Through PCN, we lead pastoral training initiatives reaching national church leaders serving in some of the most remote and underresourced regions in the world, with active partnerships in India, Thailand, Pakistan, South America, and across Africa. Our mission is straightforward: equip every pastor, resource every church, and carry the gospel to the last unreached corner of the earth. Join a community of pastors committed to faithful ministry, theological depth, and kingdom advancement.') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE settingValue = VALUES(settingValue)
